title: Humanity Knowledge Explorer v1
subtitle: Known, Partial, Open, Lost, Invisible
core_law: K_humanity = K_stabilized + K_partial + K_open + K_lost + K_invisible

zones.label: Stabilized Knowledge
zones.description: Formulated, tested, transmissible, reusable knowledge with bounded validity.

zones.label: Partial Knowledge
zones.description: Partially modeled, partially tested, not yet closed knowledge.

zones.label: Open Unknowns
zones.description: Known unknowns and explicitly recognized open questions.

zones.label: Lost Knowledge
zones.description: Forgotten, fragmented, recoded, or partially surviving knowledge.

zones.label: Invisible Unknowns
zones.description: Unknown unknowns, not yet properly formulated as questions.

priority_blocks: AI7 x TRISTAN2 x Packets deep loop
